/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -DOPENFHE_VERSION=1.5.1 -O3 -DMATHBACKEND=4 -Xpreprocessor -fopenmp -lomp -Wno-unused-command-line-argument -Xpreprocessor -fopenmp -lomp -Wno-unused-command-line-argument -arch x86_64 -mmacosx-version-min=14.0 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ownscript.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ownscript.dir/lib/Utils.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/ownscript.dir/benchmarker-testing/BFVBenchmarker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ownscript.dir/benchmarker-testing/CKKSBenchmarker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ownscript.dir/rework-fhe-reliability/FHEReliability.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ownscript.dir/rework-fhe-reliability/FT_FHEReliability.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ownscript.dir/rework-fhe-reliability/LinearRegressionModel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ownscript.dir/rework-fhe-reliability/FHECircuitDepthAnalyzer.cpp.o" -o ownscript   -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/opt/libomp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/opt/libomp/lib /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEpke.1.5.1.dylib /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEbinfhe.1.5.1.dylib -Xpreprocessor -fopenmp -lomp -Wno-unused-command-line-argument /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEcore.1.5.1.dylib -Xpreprocessor -fopenmp -lomp -Wno-unused-command-line-argument
